params.name: Earth Magnetic Field
params.description:
On Jul 10, 1600 AD, Gilbert from Britain was the first person to propose the concept of Earth's magnetic field theory.
Earth's magnetic field refers to the distributed magnetic field around Earth. In this drawing, its approximate distribution is recorded in the form of magnetic field lines. The Earth's magnetic field comprises three parts: the basic magnetic field, the external magnetic field, and the magnetic anomaly. The distribution roughly presents the characteristics of a dipole, similar …
